title: Slash command picker component with keyboard navigation
purpose: Provides a dropdown picker for slash commands with filtering, sorting, and keyboard navigation support.
module_context: Exports a React component that renders a command picker UI with keyboard navigation and mouse interaction. Defines types for commands and component props, and includes default commands.

steps.content: Return a baseline score of 1 when the query is empty.
Convert both the command name and query to lowercase for case-insensitive matching.
Assign the highest score of 1000 for exact matches between command name and query.
Assign a high score of 500 minus length difference for prefix matches including the leading slash.
Assign a score of 400 minus length difference for prefix matches after stripping the leading slash.
Assign a score of 100 minus the index of the substring match within the command name.
Assign a score of 10 for matches in the command description if no other match was found.
Return zero for commands that do not match the query at all.
Map each command to an entry with its score using the scoring function.
Filter out entries with zero scores.
Sort the remaining entries in descending order by score.
Extract and return only the command objects from the sorted entries.
Determine the source commands by using provided commands or falling back to default commands.
Filter and sort the commands based on the current query using a memoized calculation.
Initialize the selected index state to zero.
Update the selected index when the filtered list changes to maintain valid selection bounds.
Set up a keyboard event listener to handle arrow keys, enter, and escape for navigation and selection.
Return null if no commands match the query.
Render a dropdown list of commands with appropriate styling and selection indicators.
Prevent default behavior for arrow down key to avoid scrolling.
Increment the selected index and wrap around to zero when reaching the end of the list.
Prevent default behavior for arrow up key to avoid scrolling.
Decrement the selected index and wrap around to the end of the list when reaching the beginning.
Prevent default behavior for enter key to avoid form submission.
Select the currently highlighted command and call the onSelect handler.
Prevent default behavior for escape key to avoid closing the window.
Dismiss the picker by calling the onDismiss handler.
